nasb.text: And they took up Asahel and buried him in his father’s tomb which was in Bethlehem. Then Joab and his men went all night until the day dawned at Hebron.

esv.text: And they took up Asahel and buried him in the tomb of his father, which was at Bethlehem. And Joab and his men marched all night, and the day broke upon them at Hebron.

cnv.text: 他們把亞撒黑抬回去，埋葬在伯利恆他父親的墳墓裡。約押和屬他的人走了一整夜，天亮的時候才回到希伯崙。

ccb.text: 约押和他的随从把亚撒黑送到伯利恒，葬在他父亲的坟墓里。然后，他们整夜赶路，黎明的时候回到了希伯仑。
